Check for horizontal overlap between left/center/right elements

check_overlap.Rd

Checks for overlap within a single row (header or footer). Errors are collected and returned; near-miss warnings are issued immediately via rlang::warn().

Usage

check_overlap(widths, vp_width_in, overlap_warn_mm = 2, row_name = "header")

Arguments

widths

Named list with elements left, center, right (numeric inches, or NULL when element is absent).

vp_width_in

Viewport width in inches.

overlap_warn_mm

Near-miss threshold in mm. NULL skips all detection.

row_name

Prefix used in error/warning messages ("header" or "footer").

Value

Character vector of error messages (length 0 if no errors).

On this page
